description_long: This is a wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The structure features a smooth, curved surface for skating, flanked by two flat platforms at each end, each with sturdy wooden guardrails for safety. The exterior is decorated with graffiti and stickers, adding an urban, well-used aesthetic. The ramp is constructed primarily from light-colored wood, with metal fastenings and railings for reinforcement. The open central area allows for dynamic movement, while the platforms provide resting or launching points. The overall design is robust and functional, intended for skateboarding, BMX, or similar activities.
description: A wooden half-pipe skate ramp with guardrails, graffiti, and stickers, designed for urban recreational use. It features smooth curved surfaces and sturdy platforms at each end.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat end platform, wooden guardrails, and graffiti on the exterior wall.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full curved ramp profile, both end platforms, and additional stickers on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a similar platform and guardrails, featuring different graffiti and a sticker.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the continuous curve of the ramp and a sticker on the lower right.
